title: W3 guard half: marker+general-purpose denied toward pinned types; config drift advisory; spawn prose
action: Per plan.md 'Slice 3B design settled at planning' items 3-4 and W3: (1) bee-model-guard.mjs — the pinned-type rule must fire BEFORE the existing allow branches (panel warning: placed after them it is dead code — marker-only and marker+matching-param both return 0 in branches (1)/(3)): as soon as markerTier resolves to generation/extraction/review, a subagent_type of 'general-purpose' DENIES regardless of any model param — the FIX names that tier's pinned agent type (bee-gather/bee-extract/bee-review) and notes Explore for read-only gathers. [bee-tier: ceiling] + general-purpose stays ALLOWED (no pinned agent); marker + any other subagent_type (Explore, bee-*, absent) allowed; no-marker dispatches untouched. subagent_type is already read at guard.mjs:89. Keep deny-only + fail-open; new honest transport label (e.g. 'generic-type-denied'); mirror byte-identical. Test rows: per-tier general-purpose deny (bare AND with a matching model param — both must deny), ceiling+general-purpose allowed, Explore+marker allowed, absent subagent_type allowed, all ao-2aiii-1 rows regress green. (2) Drift advisory — panel BLOCKER resolution: validateModelsConfig(config) is PURE (no root, no fs) per AO12 and stays that way. Add a separate exported helper in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs, e.g. validateAgentFilesDrift(root, config) -> problems[] (reads <root>/.claude/agents/bee-*.md frontmatter model vs configured slot; absent files clean; malformed frontmatter reported, never thrown), and call it from the two hosts that HAVE root — the bee status handler (bee.mjs:383 area) and the config validate verb (bee.mjs:2015 area) via readRawConfigForValidation — appending its problems to the same output. Edit the canonical dispatcher at skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs and keep .bee/bin/bee.mjs byte-identical (mirror discipline). Rows in scripts/test_config_validate.mjs for the helper (drift flagged; match clean; missing files clean; malformed no-throw). (3) Prose: bee-swarming/SKILL.md §3 spawn rule + swarming-reference worker template — spawn the tier-matched pinned type when the rendered agent exists, runtime default only for ceiling; keep 'never another plugin's agent type' (bee-* are bee's own); bee-validating/SKILL.md checker note names bee-review. Sync .claude/.agents skill mirrors (self-onboard). Report note (panel caveat): rendering is tested, runtime registration is not — a host config using full model IDs instead of aliases renders green but may not register; note the portability gap, do not build for it. No cost-reduction claims. FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify — --check green.

truths: [bee-tier: generation|extraction|review] + subagent_type general-purpose denies BEFORE any allow branch — bare and with a matching model param alike — with the tier's pinned type named in FIX
[bee-tier: ceiling] + general-purpose stays allowed; Explore + marker stays allowed; absent subagent_type stays allowed
all ao-2aiii-1 rows (equality, membership, cli-deny, forgery, fail-open) regress green
validateModelsConfig stays pure (no root, no fs); drift lives in a separate root-taking helper called from the status handler and config-validate verb, problems appended to the same output
bee.mjs canonical and .bee/bin/bee.mjs stay byte-identical; lib mirrors byte-identical
drift advisory fires on mismatch, silent on match or absent files, never throws
spawn prose teaches pinned types; 'never another plugin's agent type' retained
prohibitions: no root/fs access added to validateModelsConfig (AO12 purity)
no change to the ao-2aiii-1 decision-order semantics beyond the new preceding rule
no refusal (advisory only) for agent-file drift
no edits outside bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write)

verify: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: W3 guard half: pinned-type deny (generic-type-denied) fires before every allow branch in bee-model-guard for generation/extraction/review markers paired with subagent_type general-purpose, naming bee-gather/bee-extract/bee-review in the FIX; ceiling stays exempt (no pinned agent). Added validateAgentFilesDrift(root, config) as a separate root-taking sibling to the pure validateModelsConfig (AO12), surfaced from both bee status and bee config validate. Updated bee-swarming SKILL.md §3 + swarming-reference.md + bee-validating SKILL.md prose to teach the pinned-type spawn rule, synced .claude/.agents mirrors. Regenerated release-manifest.
